response.overview: A child left behind by the deaths of his past is left with a grudge that consumes his life. That child, Joel, deals with his grudge and makes fatal mistakes when it takes over. Joel creates a virus meant for bats that takes over the world as he scrambles to find the cure. Along with friends, enemies, and mentors, Joel finds his way to the cure just in time for his demise.
response.title: Echoes of Vengeance
